text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our next segment today will be... Twinkle Spotlight, where we
highlight racers in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
With the Classics fast approaching, everyone is abuzz about the
stacked lineup this year. Some are even declaring this the Golden
Generation of racing!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Among them is this racer, whose carefree personality conceals her
cunning front-running strategy—Seiun Sky!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Manipulating the rest of the pack into keeping up with her pace, racing fans have dubbed her the Trickster!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Up next, we have a runner coming off of three consecutive victories,
including a graded race—King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Expectations are high for this racer considering her family
background, but her performance has yet to disappoint! We're all
wondering just how many G1 trophies she'll snatch!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And we can't forget the condor soaring in from America and snatching
wins left and right! She is the unstoppable Phantom Bird... El Condor
Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Her claim to be the world's strongest racer doesn't seem to be said in
jest! Her debut race performance has convinced fans that she will
indeed prove herself worthy of that title!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We also have another Umamusume from America, Grass Wonder! Her
grace and poise may be reminiscent of Japanese beauty, but in her
heart burns the soul of a samurai!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Taking on the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes with an undefeated record,
she claimed the crown of best junior racer in record time! Since that
fearsome performance, people have taken to calling her the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And finally, last but not least, we have a racer who came all the way
from Hokkaido to chase her dream, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Her raw talent led to her transfer to Tracen Academy, and it was on
full display at her debut! Fans are already speculating that she'll play
a significant role in the Golden Generation!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Just what sort of performance will we witness at her second race ever?
Will we all bear witness to a legend in the making?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This is it... I'm one step closer to becoming the best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! Losing sucks, doesn't it? It's okay, just let it all out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become the best racer in Japan... That is the dream that brought
Special Week to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her debut race ended in a phenomenal victory, she was excited
for her second race... which unfortunately ended with her taking a
close second.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Mom said she was going to watch my race on TV and cheer me
on too... I was really rar'n to go...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I couldn't do it... I just couldn't pass herrrr!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But you did your best, right?! You fought so hard, Speeee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um... Could you two please calm down? We wouldn't want to interfere
with anyone's training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will say though, I was also a bit surprised by the results. It seemed
like something tripped you up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You were doing so well in training...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with your running. I wouldn't have you race if
there was.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You definitely have a talent for athletics. Heck, I'd say your
abilities—particularly your final push at the end—are on track to rival
Tickezo and Brian.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Stamina-wise, you catch your breath after running fairly quickly, so I
don't foresee any issues increasing the race distance either.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Stamina-wise, you catch your breath after running fairly quickly, so I
don't foresee any issues increasing the race distance either.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Only issue I can see... is that she's wet behind the ears.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What about my ears?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Before Tracen, you never ran with other Umamusume, right? Running
by yourself and running with a whole pack of racers are worlds apart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You can't expect a course that plays to your strengths or a
comfortable pace. It's all about learning how to crush your opponents
anytime and anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's right! And experience will get you there!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm! Besides, you've only lost once.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Don't forget, we've got your back! When you fall, we'll be there to catch ya! So go ahead and crash into any obstacles at full speed!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well, maybe don't... go that far.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But it is true that you have our full support.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe, why don't we all start running together more? If it's experience
you need, that's probably the best solution.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka... You guys...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll add more practice races to our regimen! Now that we
know what we need to work on, all that's left is to move forward!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll add more practice races to our regimen! Now that we
know what we need to work on, all that's left is to move forward!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! We certainly don't want to move backwards!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I made a promise to my mom! I've got to become the best racer in all
of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Urraaaugh! Here I goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week throws herself fully into her practice races, and before
long, she's shaken free of the stupor her loss put her in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching her go, I'm reminded of the day I first scouted her. Just like
back then, her running seems to embody the earnest desire to achieve
her dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work, Special Week. I believe that concludes today's
training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You really showed that vicious training who's boss! Which makes
sense, seeing as you're MY protege!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... You've all been working so hard for me, so I knew I had to return the favor!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
If we keep this up, you'll get a feel for racing in no time. But that's
enough for today. Let's just finish off with a cooldow—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, actually... do you think I could run just a little more? I think I can
keep going.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, don'tcha think you're going overboard?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, what can I say? I just want to run!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You see... I don't actually know how I'm going to become the best
racer in Japan yet.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I need to achieve something big if I want to proudly tell my mom that
I've become the best in Japan. But no matter how much I think about
it, I can't figure out what that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
True, "the best racer in Japan" is a rather vague concept. It could
refer to your record or some singular, historic accomplishment.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right. But sitting around thinking about it all the time isn't gonna get
me anywhere, so I figured I should take it one step at a time and
focus on what I can achieve now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? Running with you all gave me an idea!
Something that'll get me just a teeeensy bit closer to my goal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Becoming a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Comin' outta the gates runnin', I see!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, Derby, and finally the Kikuka Sho... Winning even
one of those races takes top-level skills.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'd say surviving all those interviews after taking the Triple Crown was
just as hard...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well yeah, what'd you expect?! The Triple Crown's the HIGHEST of
honors!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And I need to aim for the top if I want my dream to come true. I guess you could say the path from Hokkaido to all of Japan is the high road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether the Triple Crown champion could be considered the best
racer in all of Japan would certainly make for a hot debate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But considering the scale of her dream, I think it's a fitting goal for
the immediate future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose such a big goal would indeed warrant a more
intensive training regimen.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Right. If that's what you want, Spe, then all I can say is yes! Now... get
back to training!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Right. If that's what you want, Spe, then all I can say is yes! Now... get
back to training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! Be right back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No way am I letting you have all the fun! Wait up! Let's do some
partner runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's no wonder why you invited Special Week to join our team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after facing defeat, she bounces back more determined than
ever...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That steadfast optimism of hers is exactly why I want to help her
make her dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Spe! The road to the Triple Crown is long and winding! Do
fifty laps on the dirt course, ON THE DOUBLE!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: FIFTY?! N-no waaay!
